---
title: "Data Cleansing"
subtitle: "Preparing messy data for analysis"
---

Data cleansing is the foundation of trustworthy analytics. In this section I document personal projects where I turn incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly structured data into analysis-ready tables.

## Focus areas

- Handling missing values and sentinel codes (`N/A`, `-999`, empty strings)
- Standardizing categories and recoding text to numbers
- Validating joins and duplicate records
- Documenting cleaning decisions so results are reproducible

## Projects

Project write-ups will be added here as I publish personal cleansing work. Placeholder pages remain available under this section for future posts.
